description: Multi-hop relationship query requiring chaining of two facts (employment + project championing); must cite both linking facts and wikilink all three entities.

template_vars.Query: Who at Acme Corp champions the Q2 pilot?

Sources.Title: Sarah Jones — role_at Acme Corp
Sources.Excerpt: Sarah was promoted to VP of Sales at Acme Corp on 2026-04-10.

Sources.Title: Q2 Pilot
Sources.Excerpt: Internal pilot running from March to June 2026.

expected.notes: Guards Section 10.3 rule 5: multi-hop queries must chain the linking facts with citations for each edge. Guards rule 9: wikilink all three entities on first mention.
